name: Qiniu Upload
tagline: Upload local files to Qiniu Cloud CDN and get shareable URLs instantly
description: Upload images, HTML pages, or any local files to Qiniu Cloud storage via this skill. The AI will call the upload script and return a public CDN URL. Perfect for sharing AI-generated images, HTML demos, or documents—just say "upload to Qiniu" or "put this file online". Requires Qiniu Access Key, Secret Key, bucket name, and domain configured in TsClaw.
